entry.title: SAP CAP CDS Distinct does not return distinct values
entry.content:
I am currently trying to implement a distinct entity projection based on one of my tables. The table in the data base is pretty simple and holds onto users in differnt sap onprem systems: 

entity SAPUsers: cuid {
 userId: String; 
userName: String; 
email: String;
}

In my CAP project I want to provide a search field so an enduser can search across all our SAP Landscape for one user. The user simply has to type in the search field the users username, id oder email and the SAP User will be shown in the field. 

Unfortunately across our Landscape, the username and email is not always the same (but the ID is always the same). So it can happen that one user has multiple entries in the table but the same user id. 

To make my search field a little bit more beautiful I would like to show the distinct user IDs based on the first entry that is found. 

Therefore I implemented a projection looking like the following

    entity DistinctUsers              as
        select from SAPUsers distinct{
            key userId,
            email,
            userName
        };

Since I did not find any documentation about the cds distinct keyword in the SAP CAP docu expect the following question: Question Distinct my assumption was that the distinct would be based on the id field, since this is the key for this projection. 

Unfortunately when I create the distinction like that, users that have different email or username will be shown multiple times. I also cannot leave out the email or username in the distinct entity since I need those in the search field. I also tried out to put the distinct next to the select and create a SQL like querry, but none of it worked. 

Therefore I am a little stuck on how to create a distinct entity based on the ID field but also have access to the email and userName.

entry.title: Re: How to add fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS...
entry.content: Hello @Sampath4 , looks like your question was answered. Please confirm or re-open if you have any other question. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP DSP Task Chains with CLI Wrapping: FastAPI Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud

Christian

entry.title: Pending documents are not showing under "Approval Decision Report" issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

One of my client try to see the Approved documents in "Approval Decision report", But system throw "No Matching record found". But the same its showing under "Approval Status report". 

Why the Approved documents are not showing in "Approval Decision Report". Kindly give a perfect solution ASAP.

Enclosed Screen Shot FYR.

entry.title: Re: Custom Field Type - Code list Accepting free text whi...
entry.content:
Hi

Please check following blogs that provide the detail about creating Code List,

Key User Extensibility: Create a Custom Code List ... - SAP Community

If you still meet the same issue, I would like advise you to raise an incident to SAP product support team.

 

Kind Regards,

Lucy

Kind regards,
Jonas

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan and Measuring Point cannot be mainta...
entry.content: Hello This is known issue in CE2408. It will be fixed as part of HF cycle 07. This will reach your systems by the 21st of October 2024

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan and Measuring Point cannot be mainta...

entry.title: How to show/ hide Indicator charts in SAC dashboard based on roles
entry.content:
Hi ,

We have a story which has a model with data access and privacy enabled and roles created. The table data is getting filtered based on the role as well as the charts data.

But we would like to show or hide the charts based on this role.

How can this be achieved on the SAC dashboard. 

Regards,

Natasha

entry.title: Re: Set Up Trust Between SAP Cloud Identity Services and SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment
entry.content: If the trust configuration was initiated from BTP for a certain application, then this application may determine that only a certain attribute is allowed as subject name id

entry.title: Re: Are you affected by SCIP database of ECHA? Think about SAP Product Compliance for Discrete Indus
entry.content:
If you're looking for a standard software solution that includes ongoing maintenance, opesus software for the EU SCIP Database is the ideal choice!

Seamlessly integrated with SAP Product Compliance and SAP Product and REACH Compliance, it automatically detects and sends new or updated compliance data directly to the EU SCIP database.

And if you're not currently using SAP Product Compliance or SAP Product and REACH Compliance, no problem—the solution can work independently of these.

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP DSP Task Chains with CLI Wrapping: FastAPI Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @christian_willi

It's:

entry.title: Re: outlook.aplication - chose sender (from)
entry.content: Thank you, this was incredibly helpful and it worked perfectly. What a relief!

entry.title: Workzone BPA task error "Failed to resolve dependencies of 'CrossApplicationNavigation.js'"
entry.content:
Dear Community,
since Monday I can’t see custom tasks in Workzone in some clients' sub-accounts.

The error I see in the browser console is:
Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/ushell/appRuntime/ui5/services/CrossApplicationNavigation.js'

Tasks are correctly viewable on use MyInbox of BPA.

Does anyone else have this error?

@Archana Could it be due to some update over the weekend?

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: IAS instance error
entry.content: It seems that you have only default IdP (= SAP ID service) as trusted IdP's. For this instance a default trust exists and no application specific config (with application plan) is possible.

entry.title: Re: IAS instance error
entry.content: To setup a specific trust you first have to configure trust to a custom IAS tenant and then you can configure application trust.

entry.title: Re: Remote Client copy without Personal data (PA Tables)
entry.content: I am afraid that the profile SAP_APPL will not exclude PA tables... PA tables have class delivery"A", and Application data includes class delivery "A" tables!

entry.title: Re: Error opening Guided Development in VSCode
entry.content:
Hello Rutul,

I tried to reproduce your issue with one of our test projects that also comprises several apps, but did not succeed. In my case (VS Code 1.94.0) no error occurred. I could open Guided Help for all projects. Also switched one of them to UI5 1.124 so that I get ux-specification 1.124.2 - no problem either.
Thus it seems to be a special problem of your project constellation. 
Could you please open a Service Now ticket, comprising your archived project?

entry.title: FIORI Lauchpad "FILE NOT FOUND" for specific Active Directory User
entry.content:
Hello,

i have started to be the SAP basis administrator for my company a couple of month ago and am facing an issue which is very strange and where i am completely stuck now.

A new active directory user has been created for a coworker as he switched departments. We are using different usernames and password for AD and SAP, so no SSO activated.

Logging into a windows system with this(!!) AD user (not SAP user) and browsing to the FLP with its FQDN(!!), you are prompted with the login screen. After entering valid credentials, you get a "FILE NOT FOUND" error for every(!!) SAP user. If you call the FLP URL using the IP address(!!), it works fine. If you log into the system with a different AD user, it works fine using FQDN or IP. We checked three different systems, everytime the same behaviour.

So, bottom line: FLP does not work when called by FQDN for this specific AD user.

I thought it might have something to do with our certificate we used for the FLP, as i use a certificated signed by our private CA in the SSL-Server PSE. However, it has the FQDN, hostname and IP address in as SAN. And why would that only be an issue for a specific AD user.

We increased the trace level of ICM, but didn't see any error which would explain this behaviour. We already checked firewall, there is nothing blocked (and our fw doesn't filter in context with AD users anyway). The AD user affected doesn't get any group policies different than other ad users who do not have this problem.

We also checked /IWFND/ERROR_LOG.

Using developer tools of the browser does not show any error except the SAP server responding "file not found".

I know this problem is too specific for anyone of you to have a answer, but are there any more logs we can activate or take a look into ? I mean, if SAP says it can not find a file, there must be a trace anyway to show what happened.

Any help appreciated.

Regards

   Andre

entry.title: Re: Ho to create a Testuser for RAP App in BTP?
entry.content: Thanks for you reply Kai! I had a look at those articles and did all necessary steps (Maintain Employee, Maintain Business User) and would expect to receive a welcome email (the email address has been checked and is valid). When I try to use the SAP ID Service > Forgot My Password, I also don't get an email. Does the email have to be assigned to a SAP Account / ID? Which is not the case. It is only for test purposes.

entry.title: Re: 500 connection Timed Out while updating Scheduling settings SAP TM
entry.content:
Time outs will not be recorded in st22. Its not a system dump. Please check if this helps

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_TRANSPORTATION_MANAGEMENT/54cf405c9d9e4c96bf091967ea29d6a7/7f3c715186311f66e10000000a441470.html

entry.title: How to restrict CDS view through PFCG role without field restrictions ?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts.

I'm implementing one CDS view that should be viewed by all users who have a specific PFCG role .

I tried to implement it through access controls [  grant select on
MY_CDS_VIEW
where aspect pfcg_auth ...]

but this way my authorization object has to have a field mapped to my view to filter data based on that .. but in my case all users with that role will have full access on the cds data . how to Implement that ?

entry.title: Re: How to reduce the size of ODQDATA?
entry.content:
Hello @Hoang_hung123 

The note 2502498 - Huge amount of data in ODQDATA table list 4 possible reasons for ODQDATA growth. There are also dependent notes. Have you verified all of them?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE does not show childs
entry.content: Hi all, i have found a solution by myself. The answer was quit simple: I did not expose the composition views in my service

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS User store
entry.content: In general the recommendation is to establish the Identity Directory as central user store for SAP cloud applications. See SAP's CIO guide for Identity Lifecycle https://www.sap.com/documents/2018/05/38ce7d25-067d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.html. However the SAP cloud applications vary in adopting the reference architecture and so one should always check the respective application docu.

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS User store
entry.content: Concerning best practices I recommend https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/btp-admin-guide/setting-up-identity-lifecycle

entry.title: Re: Custom Field Type - Code list Accepting free text whi...
entry.content:
Hi Lucy,
Thanks for your response!

kindly note we have already created custom field with type code list.
Issue which we are facing is - we are able to enter free text/word which is not maintained in code values - custom field and we want to restrict this.

Thanks,
Ankit

entry.title: Re: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE does not show childs
entry.content: I must have missed the passage in which ALL views have to go to the service. It would of course be cool if a ROOT view were sufficient and all dependent views were then automatically exposed.

Hi,

how can i change measure in dynamic reference line with api?

is it possibile?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: 500 connection Timed Out while updating Scheduling se...
entry.content:
Hello @mapetica 

See the "Frequently Asked Questions" section of the note 1743069 - Consulting Note: Schedule Upload from File. Question 2 addresses your problem.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Error activating Business Content Sales Analysis in S...
entry.content: The issue was resolved with the new Datasphere release 2024.21, the import now worked for us

entry.title: Inproces inspection result recording
entry.content:
Hello,

We have requirement for inprocess inspection at customer.

We have implemented inspection 03 on Material level.

MIC should be assigned on operation level. I have a questions to that setup:

1. Is operation confirmation stopped if results for MIC are not recorded?

2. Customer would like to have recording for each PC so I set MIC as reference characteristic, single results. How can we ensure that if we have 2PC and 1 is ok but second is not ok we will repeat the test? We need to have it documented in inspection lot, that the measurement for second part was done once again. How to set it up?

3. Can we perform partial confirmation in this process?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP DSP Task Chains with CLI Wrapping: FastAPI Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @klorn_pallier ,

I cannot see the authorization-url. Is it not visible in the screenshot or missing?

Did you already try to perform the steps mentioned in the mentioned note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3461484

Regards

Christian

entry.title: Output Management: Alternative to SMTP? (E-Mails)
entry.content:
Hi community,

We are exploring a scenario within our SAP system (S4 private cloud) where we need to send invoices as PDF documents to our business partners. To my knowledge, the standard SAP logic typically employs the SMTP protocol for such tasks. However, for our specific requirements, we are interested in utilizing an alternative protocol (most probably http). Our idea would be to reach to the integration suite via an alternative protocoll and there we could use the Microsoft Graph API.

Has anyone implemented such scenario for sending PDF invoices? If so, could you please share insights or guidance on the following points. Do we need custom logic or is there standard logic available?

I would appreciate any documentation, SAP notes, or personal experiences related to this topic.

Thank you in advance for your help and support!

Best Regards,

Dominic

entry.title: Re: Custom Field Type - Code list Accepting free text whi...
entry.content:
Dear Ankit,

Yes, I understood your issue and the current situation, I just hope that the blog can also help you review your whole process to avoid any missing steps. If all of your steps are ok then please submit an accident to report the standard product issue since this may be belong to product bug.

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Re: Ho to create a Testuser for RAP App in BTP?
entry.content: Problem was, that we created the user in BTP only via custom IAS. We need to create it with the IdP!

entry.title: Re: Key Highlights from the 2H 2024 Release of Performance and Goals Management
entry.content: Delegate, finally.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Provider Contract and Subscription contract
entry.content: Hello Francois_thimon, We are working on a project that currently operates on a subscription-based model using CRM and other legacy systems. The business now wants to migrate to a provider contract-based model. Is this migration possible? If so, from CC point of view could you please provide insights or documentation on how we can achieve this transition? Any information or recommendations on the steps and challenges involved would be greatly appreciated."

entry.title: Re: Ho to create a Testuser for RAP App in BTP?
entry.content: Neither the Maintain Employee nor the Maintain Business User app will send an e-mail. Such mail is sent by the IdP. If you have established trust from the subaccount to a custom Identity Authentication tenant and use this for authentication, then you need to maintain a user in that tenant. If you use the SAP ID service, then you need to create a user in SAP ID service. The user in SAP ID service does not need to fulfill any additional requirements.

entry.title: What is the maximum votes required for requirement in customer influence page.
entry.content:
I hope everybody knows the customer influence page where we can input our improvement requests in the standard SAP process or add functionalities from the business side or consultants side.

I would like to know what is the maximum number of votes needed to get the improvement done?

Also would like you to have a look and vote for the request if you think it may help you on consulting. ID: 331617, 331620, 331622, 331623, 331624, 331625, 331626, 331627, 331629, 331633, 331636, 331637, 332191, 332193, 331974.

Use the below steps for voting.

Go to the customer influence page.

  1. Click the Influence opportunity (Bulb symbol) on the sidebar.
  2. Then choose open for voting and use the filter 'SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Manufacturing' in the influence opportunity.
  3. Go down and click the go button to get the list.
  4. In addition in the search bar you can use request or the author's name to get the list.
  5. At last read the requirement's and click heart button.

Also I would like you guys to suggest your ideas over there.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Ho to create a Testuser for RAP App in BTP?
entry.content: Problem was, that we created the user in BTP only via custom IAS. We need to create it with the IdP!

entry.title: Re: Api to change measure in dynamic reference line
entry.content: Yes, you can change the measure in a dynamic reference line using the API. This typically involves updating the reference line's properties with the new measure data and then refreshing the visualization. Make sure to check the API documentation for specific methods and examples related to your visualization tool.

entry.title: Feasibility to Process Soap APIs in Background
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are currently using the standard SOAP API - schedgagrmtdlivschedule_in to create, and update delivery schedules of sales scheduling agreements . However the API gets processed immediately once invoked from the middleware. The business requirement here is to not automatically process the payload data rather -
1. To store it in S4 
2. Have the payload validated by business user
3. And then process it after confirmation.
Is it feasible to have such type of scenario in S4 with SOAP APIs to hold the data before posting/processing? to give a better understanding we can think and visualize how Inbound Idocs work where we have an option to select "Trigger Immediately" or "Trigger by Background Program" .
Constraints: Stopping/storing in Middleware is not recommended by client

entry.title: How to find out BADIs of Post General Journal Entries APP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Environments:
SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2408
and
SAP BTP, ABAP environment 2408

I want to post some data to add-on table(BTP ABAP environment) by custom API
when I post a new journal entry with APP - Post General Journal Entries(S/4HANA Cloud Public).

There are any BAdis I can use with developer extensibility to do that?
or how to find each BAdis implement to which app?

kindly thanks for help.

entry.title: Re: 传统公司间库存转储 (1P9) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Central Business Configuration: Scope extension - SAP Community @DineKorloy 可以看看这个博客，扩展项目范围

entry.title: Re: Get your exclusive SAP TechEd certification discount and make your career growth real
entry.content:
Hi @Vinay34 , 
this blog post refers to last years SAP TechEd in 2023. 

Please refer to this Community blog post for 2024.
You are right, the discount campaign in 2024 is for a subscription to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub and includes four SAP Certification exam attempts per year to get and stay certified!

Please visit SAP Store and enter your promotional code to redeem your 25% discount. The promotional code is valid until October 12, 2024. 

Best regards, Ellen

entry.title: logsegment'segment is full/has no free extents
entry.content:
Dear All,

SAP Solution manager 7.2, OS --> Windows & DB ---> Sybase

SAP solman is down. R3trans -dx shows below error message.

4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] dbsybslib.dll patch info
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] SAP patchlevel 0
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] SAP patchno 900
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Last SYBASE DBSL patchlevel 0
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Last SYBASE DBSL patchno 900
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Last SYBASE DBSL patchcomment SAP Support Package Stack Kernel 7.53 Patch Level 900 (3107459)
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] GetServerInfo version: Adaptive Server Enterprise/16.0 SP02 PL05 HF1/EBF 26754 SMP/P/X64/Windows Server/ase160sp02pl05x/0/64-bit/FBO/Tue Jan 17 04:16:02 2017
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] INFO: only appcontext supported for session variables for Sybase ASE release 16.0.02.05.
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] GetServerInfo release: 16.0.02.05
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] GetServerInfo architecture: x86_64
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] GetServerInfo edition: P
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] GetServerInfo byte width: 64 bit
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Fri Oct 04 09:27:43 2024
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] spid 158 comm rd ODBC
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] spid 159 unc rd ODBC
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Driver: Adaptive Server Enterprise Driver release: 16.0.02.05
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Driver full version: SAP ASE ODBC Driver/16.0.02.05/16.0 SP02 PL05/P/x86_64/Windows/drv16/Build 1/64-bit/Normal/Fri Nov 18 UTC 07:55:31 2016/SQLLEN8
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] dbs/syb/cache_size: 200
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] ERROR: -1 in function GetDbAndUserNames (SQLExecDirect failed) [line 51632]
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] (1105) [ZZZZZ] [SAP][ASE ODBC Driver][Adaptive Server Enterprise]Can't allocate space for objec
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] t 'syslogs' in database 'SID' because 'logsegment' segment is full/has no free e
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] xtents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise,
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] transaction aborted by server
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] ERROR: failed to retrieve db and user name
4 ETW000 [ dblink ,00000] ***LOG BY2=>sql error 99987 performing CON
4 ETW000 [ dblink ,00000] ***LOG BY0=>[ASE Error SQL99987]ERROR: failed to retrieve db and user name
2EETW169 no connect possible: "DBMS = SYBASE --- "

Please check and advise.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Exam Guidance
entry.content:
Hi @MMUAAZ 

We currently offer the C_S4CPB SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition certification.
Please access the website. There you find 
  • Topic areas
  • How to prepare
  • Stay Certified
  • Schedule your exam
  • Safeguarding

Does this help?

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to restrict CDS view through PFCG role without fi...
entry.content:
To grant full access to your CDS view for all users with a specific PFCG role, you can create a dedicated authorization object that simply checks for the role without additional field mappings.

Use the `grant select on MY_CDS_VIEW statement with the pfcg_auth aspect to control access based on the role.

Ensure that the authorization checks are properly defined in the CDS view to allow users with the role to access all data.

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP DSP Task Chains with CLI Wrapping: FastAPI Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Yes sorry I accidently covered the auth url and I've tried the notes but the same message:

entry.title: Re: Configuration for manual Absence Days in IT2001
entry.content:
Hi,

Don’t know if you can do this, but even if you could not sure it sounds like a good idea!

When you say ‘make the input as simple as possible’ you are actually doing the opposite in that the person keying the absence has to figure out the number each time rather then the system automatically calculating it. You could (or more likely would) end up with all kinds of inconsistencies between dates, payroll days and calendar days etc.

What are these recorded absences to be used for? If you do not require the  functionality that comes with IT2001 (and associated quotas on IT2006)  then don’t use it. As a simple alternative you could perhaps use IT2010 and set up wage types for each of your absences and record them simply in there.

bg

entry.title: Automated Process for movement of Blocked/Batched Restric Stock from one plant to another plant
entry.content:
Dear All,

This is a business scenario where we are looking to movement of Blocked stock & Batch Restricted stock from one plant to another plant for both Inter and Intra.

We have explored below two options:

1) The transfer posting option but that's manual work is tedious for them and there is no proper document trail for it. 

2) We also have look at having a STO type with custom checking rule but in the STO deliveries we have to code changes in Availability user exits which is risky for AATP as per SAP recommendation.

Can anyone has any other option to have it more automated process and is possible we less enhancement.

Regards,

Sidharth

entry.title: Re: Lumira Support for BW/4 HANA 2021 > SPS03
entry.content:
The PAM indicating BW/4HANA 2021 SPS03 means that SPS03 is the minimum required version, but you can upgrade to SPS05 without issues.

Ensure that your Lumira version is compatible with SPS05 by checking the relevant SAP notes or documentation; we can successfully upgrade without major problems.

entry.title: Re: How can I obtain groups assigned to a user in Cloud Identity Services within my OData service in
entry.content: Making the 'backend' application aware of the user context can be achieved by protecting/authenticating the call with a token that contains a user identifier ('principal propagation'); e.g. the OIDC token issued by IAS could be an option. And beforehand one should provision the user-group assignments from a central user store or access governance system to the backend system. This can be done with the Identity Provisioning service.

entry.title: Re: What is the maximum votes required for requirement in...
entry.content:
Hello @RaghavanKathamuthu 

The threshold depends on the improvement opportunity. I guess your question is about "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Manufacturing". Here the threshold is 6 votes. Votes from the same company/customer are counted as one.

However be aware that even if your proposal passes the threshold, it doesn't guarantee that SAP will implement it. SAP will consider and review proposals with enough votes, but the implementation is still to their sole discretion.

I had several improvements with huge voters support. They were rejected by SAP as "not in the scope" or "not planned". That is why I have gotten somehow disappointed with the program. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Different Configuration in QA and production system in Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello Ajay,

Have the customer/project Gone live? If yes, then do an instant Refresh from Prod to QA.-- Yes project is go live and we have submitted for Instance Refresh

After Refresh Instance - how to log in system in First time or requesting to you please guide us other Important activity after Refresh 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: MFA implementation for privileged users.
entry.content: Sure this is possible: S/4 public cloud tenants are always integrated with a customer's IAS tenant. And in IAS MFA can be configured based on rules: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/risk-based-authentication-for-application - adding the five users to a group and enforce MFA for this group will do the job.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Aalborg
entry.content:
Brought to you by SAP Community members, the SAP Stammtisch is an informal meetup everyone can participate: SAP users, developers, consultants and architects - come and join us and bring a friend.

If you want to join the SAP Stammtisch in Aalborg, please leave your RSVP via this link. 

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration. However, if you want to earn an SAP Community badge, please leave your RSVP here as well.

Regards
Arunkumar AS

entry.title: Printing Multiple Invoices per Page in Crystal Reports
entry.content:
I need to print four invoices side by side on a single A4 page using Crystal Reports. To achieve this, I'll divide the A4 page into four equal sections. Each section will contain a unique invoice, ensuring no duplication or repetition of invoices. This layout will allow me to display four invoices efficiently on every A4 page.

I attempted to design invoices side by side on a single A4 page, but the printing process is producing duplicate invoices and failing to print subsequent invoice records.

entry.title: Re: Fiori launchpad content manager vs Launchpad designer
entry.content: Hello Sankar, As this post is from 2020, can you please confirm if there is a change in Best Prachtices for managing custom technical catalogs? I have read that Launchpad designer and Group concept is deprecated. We are using UI5 Apps and are presently using Launchpad designer for maintaing custom technical catalogs and custom business catalogs. Can the technical catalogs be confiured using /UI2/FLPAM for SAP UI5 Apps

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Extensibility – Simplified Guide for Beginners
entry.content: Great work in explaining the concept in one blog. Thanks a bunch @Raja_Gupta

entry.title: How to export data from SAC Planning ODE Story into Google Sheets
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to export the data from SAC ODE story on a click of a button & import it to Google Sheets. I know which the recent release we have a option to export data to Google slides but I'm looking for Google sheets. Has any one come across such a requirement & what is the custom solution for the same. Thanks.

 

 

Regards

Murali.M

entry.title: Re: Missing items during addition of ADT plugin to Eclipse
entry.content:
These are additional Eclipse dependencies needed by ADT, which need to be fetched from the Eclipse update site.

Do you have [x] Contact all update sites during install to find requried software enabled on the first page of the "Help ->Install new software" wizard?

entry.title: Re: How to integrate SAP Datasphere Consumption API in SA...
entry.content:
The Check Connection only checks whether it can reach the destination, and since you got a 401 it was able to reach it, though could not authenticate you. You can actually see by the icon that the check connection feature considers this a success.

I would try the destination from the app and see if it works.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2024
entry.content:
Hi Arunkumar AS,

what kind of information do you mean? Can you please provide us more details regarding the issue you mentioned. Do you have created a ticket for your issue?

Regards, Andreas

entry.title: Re: Data append from one database to another
entry.content: Our requirement is not table structure change. It is to add data from source database to target database, without removing any data in the target.

entry.title: Enjoying TechEd virtual while developing CAP solutions
Re: How to show/ hide Indicator charts in SAC dashboard b...
entry.content:
Hi,

Good day!!

Not sure if you can control the widget visibility in the role level . However as a work around you can try to do this in the script by maintaining the list of users as mentioned in the below code.

1. Maintain the list of users who wants the specific widget visibility

2. Get the current user 

3. Control the visibility of the widgets

//Below code has to be written in the OnInitialisation of Page
//maintain user list who needs table
var ShowTableUsers = ["RAMKUMAR","User2","User3"];

//maintain user list who needs chart
var ShowChartUsers = ["User4","User5"];

//Get the Current User
var CurrentUser = Application.getUserInfo();
var User = CurrentUser.id;
console.log(User);

//Set the table visible if the user is present in the list
if(ShowTableUsers.includes(User) === true)
{
	Table_1.setVisible(true);
	Chart_1.setVisible(false);
}
//Set the chart visible if the user is present in the list
if(ShowChartUsers.includes(User)===true)
{
	Table_1.setVisible(false);
	Chart_1.setVisible(true);

}
//if the user in present in both the list then both widgets visble
if(ShowTableUsers.includes(User) === true && ShowChartUsers.includes(User)===true )
{
	Table_1.setVisible(true);
	Chart_1.setVisible(true);
}

Please note that this might impact the performance in the huge list of users and multiple widget usages.

Hope this helps 🙂

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: Re: SAP IDM Intergrate several file

can you elaborate how you send files to IdM? Do you store it on a share that IdM can access and perform actions on scheduled basis?
What do you want to achieve?

entry.title: To set the Ranges for expats as "0" or NA
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We have used standard field from EC to display in the worksheet for Ranges (Min, Mid and Max). we want to set the ranges to NA or 0 in worksheet  or EC for expats, to identify expats we have created a column called as "Is Expat" & written business rule to consider only the host assignment, if the value of 'Is Expat' is yes then they are expats.

Request to please suggest a solution on how to make them as NA or 0 either in EC or worksheet. 

Regards,

Shaheen

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud and On-Premise SAP HANA SSO Setup With External Identity Provider
entry.content: Hi @ankitarora_04 , I currently using SSO Authentication for my Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA. Everything work perfectly except the one thing: The SAP HANA XS auto log off after I restart my computer or after a day, and I need to log in again( image below). How can I config HANA XS never log out (session time out = never) ? Because I share the report for other 50 people in my company, and each people has his/her own SAC account corresponding to a HANA account (because I use a Live Connection so the only way to data authentication is in HANA instead of in SAC). And I don't want to provide password of HANA to user because of sensitive so I want to setup the logon HANA XS once for each user, so that every time they view the report, the logon session still there.

entry.title: Re: What's Export Import Sighting Record in S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi Henry

Thanks for your response. I found out later, it's NOT a standard Fiori APP, but apparently my customer has developed a custom one, where we were looking for 'how it works'..........I am yet to align with my technical team who helped develop those APPs. 

For now, kindly consider my query as 'closed'. 

Cheers, Siva

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Technical Catalog Migration – How the migration process works
entry.content:
Hello Jocelyn,

Thanks for the much needed blog. We are currently using launchpad designer. We have custom Ui5 apps and apps with orginal target mappings are in catalogs which we refer to as custom technical catalog. We have also created business catalogs and the apps in these catalogs are created as a reference from custom technical catalogs. We are upgrading to S4, hence want to go for content manager and application manager. However I couldn't find the tansaction /UI2/MGR_TC in the upgraded system. If its due to the old version, then should the  technical catalogs and SAP UI5 Apps be created and configured  manually using /ui2/FLPAM or is the  Launchpad designer still needed? Can you please share the latest document fot this scenario?

Many thanks & Best Regards,

Smriti Gupa

entry.title: Re: Business Catalog missing in App "Manage Launchpad Pages"
entry.content:
Hi Kai! 

adding the Launchpad App Descr Item ID to the IAM App solved the issue!

entry.title: Re: SAP ISU - Meter to Cash
entry.content: Good story. I have a question: could you elaborate on the connection between a SD order or SD contract and meter to cash? Is there a relationship e.g. are metered orders created with a relationship to the SD contract or are these only financial. many thanks

entry.title: Change document not showing latest CR for business partner in 'Display change document' in SAP MDG.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

User has created one CR which is final check approved with some changes in business partner. But it's not showing under 'Display change document' on NWBC for that business partner. If we open the change request and then go to the change document, we are able to see the change log. What could be the reason behind this?

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Re: SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) Forecasting Algorithms
entry.content: Question to this - is there a way the system can rather suggest which forecasting technique to use? Wouldn’t it be a great AI case if planners didn’t have to decide what algorithm to use in which case ?

entry.title: Re: Pricing error in item Message no. VF073
entry.content:
Hello.
May I kindly suggest you to read again my first posting? It contains everything you need to know about my work.
There is nothing to be filled for the mandatory condition, I explained in my first posting that its requirement is not met for it and that is the reason that particular pricing condition is not active in any of the 3 documents mentioned: sales order, first invoice and cancellation invoice. Since the pricing problem is only active in the cancellation invoice I'm confident to believe that's not the cause of my problem.

What else can you suggest for me?

Thank you.

entry.title: Quantum Computing: The Next Big Leap in Tech (And Why You Should Care)
entry.content:
This tech innovation is rapidly shaping up to be a game-changer—and it’s not just for scientists or tech geeks. It’s something that could touch every aspect of our lives, whether we realize it or not.

So, what is quantum computing? To keep it simple, it’s a new type of computer that doesn’t just think in binary (0s and 1s) like our current computers. Instead, quantum computers use qubits, which can exist in multiple states at once. This gives them the ability to process massive amounts of data far faster than any supercomputer today.

Why should this matter to you? Well, imagine a world where we can solve complex problems in seconds that would take traditional computers years to crack. Think about breakthroughs in drug discovery, climate change solutions, or unbreakable encryption to protect your data. Quantum computing could make these “what ifs” a reality sooner than we think.

It’s not just a far-off dream either. Companies are already investing heavily in making quantum computing a practical reality. And who knows—maybe in the next decade, quantum-powered smartphones could be in our pockets!

Curious to learn more? Exploring Quantum Computing by Nature

Quantum computing isn’t just the future—it’s coming faster than we think. Are you ready to be part of the next big leap?

entry.title: Re: Pre-delivered PCC validations.
entry.content: you can see the SAP Note 3143779 - SAP Best Practices for Payroll Control Center - Based on "Manage Configuration Application"

entry.title: Re: Api to change measure in dynamic reference line
entry.content:
// Assuming you have a reference to your visualization
const viz = /* your visualization reference */;
const newMeasure = 'SUM(Sales)'; // Example of the new measure

// Update the reference line
viz.setReferenceLine({
measure: newMeasure,
label: 'Updated Sales Reference',
lineType: 'dashed',
color: '#FF5733',
});

// Refresh the visualization to apply changes
viz.refresh();

 

Note: The newMeasure and other parameters according to your needs

entry.title: Re: Configuration for manual Absence Days in IT2001
entry.content: Dear bg, actually, there is an intranet application for personnel to apply for their annual leave and a workflow logic to route the request to his supervisor. His supervisor then check a for approval. The data then became part of an interface records to upload to SAP for generating the IT2001 record. Hence his supervisor is responsible to validate the accuracy rather than SAP does the validation.

entry.title: Re: Accessing PCC Processes Issue
entry.content: what's the details Odata error you got ? Could be an authorization issue

entry.title: Re: Integrate Sharepoint online with Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

To be honest I am not sure anymore. The thing is we have changed our approach. Somehow for SAC > SharePoint integration there is a separate tutorial / SAP note, which works a bit differently:  https://me.sap.com/notes/3446524/E

We found out that if we create a SAC > SharePoint connection using this SAP note we can reuse the Open Connector instance for Datasphere > SharePoint. So this is what we do now. I don't follow the description from above anymore.

In this SAP note it is explained which redirect URI you should use. I assume that for the steps that I have described above same redirect URI should be fine.

Best,

Koray

entry.title: Error shows that Labor resource not available for service
entry.content:
The user is not able to release a sales order, due to the error saying that Labor Resource not available for service item.

Error: Item **: Labor resource not available for service performer ABC. (ABC represents the service performer ID)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error shows that Labor resource not available for ser...
entry.content:
The reason for this error is due to the fact that there is no active Labor Resource matches the service performer (cost center, job), so it is not able to fill the labor resource in the order.

You will need to maintain the valid Labor Resource match the service performer.

KBA 1692907 explains the same.

1692907 - In Your Sales Orders the Error Message : "Labor resource not available for service performer" is Triggered

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/1692907

entry.title: Re: How can we add entry in TKEVG table ?
entry.content: Hello Coleti,
